description: Alonso solo attacker. minxxx attacks with Alonso (S1: 40% chance lethality +30%, S2: 20% chance opp damage down 40% for 2t, S3: 50% chance extra attack damage up 40%) using 100/100/100 t6 troops. WIP defends with no heroes using 333/333/333 t6. All three skills are chance-based; collect 30 game results for RNG confidence. Reference: WOS-292.
